backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Review and Rating types with stable maps, and four public methods to submit and query reviews/ratings with validation and sorting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product requirement (header, Home, About, Vehicles, Contact, Ratings pages) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including primary, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Lucky Holidays' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Home, About, Vehicles, Contact, Ratings) all wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer rendering brand logo, quick navigation links, contact details (phone/email/location), copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with the LUCKY HOLIDAYS logo (links to Home), desktop navigation bar, and a collapsible mobile menu with active-link highlighting.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that places the Header above and Footer below the main page content in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all ratings and reviews, and mutations for submitting a rating or review via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page for LUCKY HOLIDAYS displaying the company story, core values, and a timeline of milestones from 2010 to 2025.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a validated contact form and contact info cards (phone, email, hours) for LUCKY HOLIDAYS.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner, stats bar, service highlights, and a grid of popular travel destinations for LUCKY HOLIDAYS.
frontend/src/pages/Ratings.tsx: Ratings page that displays average star ratings and customer reviews fetched from the backend, and provides a form for users to submit a star rating and written review.
frontend/src/pages/Vehicles.tsx: Vehicles page that renders a static grid of vehicle cards (Innova, Fortuner, coaches, etc.) each showing an image, name, type, capacity, features, and an optional badge.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadows, and animations (fade-in, accordion) with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the LUCKY HOLIDAYS multi-page travel website, its existing features, contact details, image requirements, and architectural notes.
